ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the employment status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the age group is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_level" TEXT /* Level of the region (e.g., London, ITL3, ITL1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the region is currently active */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Total headcount for the employment status */,
  "fte" INTEGER /* Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) count */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary for the employment status and region */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for the employment status and region */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of gender */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of education levels */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data entry is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last update of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES employment_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp to record when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last login time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to record the last update of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report or data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report or data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access event is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
